items.name: Umbrella-Spoofer-HWID
items.description: A hardware ID (HWID) spoofer is a programme that alters or substitutes a computer’s unique hardware identifiers (HWIDs) in order to bypass bans (HWID bans) in online games. An HWID is a unique set of hardware identifiers for a computer that anti-cheat systems collect to track and block cheaters.
